verses.1: LORD, my God, I take refuge in you.
verses.2: lest they tear apart my soul like a lion,
verses.3: LORD, my God, if I have done this,
verses.4: if I have rewarded evil to him who was at peace with me
verses.5: let the enemy pursue my soul, and overtake it;
verses.7: Let the congregation of the peoples surround you.
verses.8: The LORD administers judgment to the peoples.
verses.9: Oh let the wickedness of the wicked come to an end,
verses.12: If a man doesn’t repent, he will sharpen his sword;
verses.13: He has also prepared for himself the instruments of death.
verses.16: The trouble he causes shall return to his own head.
verses.17: I will give thanks to the LORD according to his righteousness,
